name: Deadly Precision Crystal
description: This weapon looks more slender and elegant than others of its type. Its blade, point, or head glitters as though a thousand tiny facets were reflecting the ambient light. A deadly precision weapon deals an extra 1d6 points of damage whenever you make a successful sneak attack or sudden strike with it. The property grants no benefit if you don't already have one of these class features, and its bonus doesn't increase if you have both.
unidentifiedDesc: An elegant, glittering weapon augmentation crystal.
